questions.question: Define the term 'Tree' in the context of data structures. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: A Tree is a non-linear data structure consisting of nodes with a value and zero or more child nodes.

questions.question: Explain the difference between an Inorder, Preorder, and Postorder traversal of a binary tree. Provide a diagram to support your answer.
questions.hint: Use a binary tree with 5 nodes to illustrate the differences between the three types of traversals.

questions.question: Suppose we have a binary tree with the following structure:        1           /   \      2       3        / \       4       5     / \      6       7Describe the time complexity of a thread traversal of this tree.
questions.hint: Identify the number of nodes at each level and calculate the time complexity.
